# CONSTITUTION — Knowledge-Hub
# Generated by /constitution create. Edit via /constitution update only.
# Version: 1.0 | Date: {{DATE}}

---

## Purpose
Brysen Group internal AI knowledge platform.
Enable all employees to instantly access company knowledge across languages and countries.
API-first: all interfaces (Web, Teams, Slack) consume the same /v1/* endpoints.

---

## Principles

| ID   | Principle | Rationale |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| P001 | Spec before code. No implementation without a task file. | Prevents drift, enables async team collaboration |
| P002 | RBAC is foundational, not an afterthought. Applied at DB layer. | Data leakage across orgs is unacceptable |
| P003 | Multilingual by design. All 4 languages treated equally. | No language is a second-class citizen |
| P004 | API contract is the source of truth for all consumers. | Bots and SPA must behave identically |
| P005 | Fail fast, fail visibly. Structured errors, no silent failures. | Debugging across languages/timezones requires clarity |
| P006 | Performance is a feature. Latency SLA is non-negotiable. | Slow search = unused platform |

---

## Hard Constraints

| ID   | Constraint |
|------|------------|
| C001 | RBAC filter applied at pgvector WHERE clause — never post-retrieval in Python |
| C002 | RBAC role hierarchy: flat, maximum 3 levels, no nested groups |
| C003 | PII must never appear in vector metadata — doc_id + lang + user_group_id only |
| C004 | All /v1/* endpoints require auth. /v1/health is the only exception |
| C005 | API versioning: /v1/ prefix mandatory. Breaking changes require /v2/ |
| C006 | CJK languages (ja, zh) require language-aware tokenizer. Whitespace split forbidden |
| C007 | Hybrid search weights are configurable via env vars, never hardcoded |
| C008 | Audit log required for every document access event |

---

## Non-Negotiables
These cannot be overridden by any spec, plan, or task:

- Zero PII in vector store
- Zero hardcoded secrets in source code
- Zero anonymous access to document endpoints
- Zero breaking changes to /v1/ without version bump
- Zero SQL string interpolation — parameterized queries only

---

## Team Conventions

### Naming
- Files: `snake_case.py`, migrations: `NNN_description.sql`
- Classes: `PascalCase`, constants: `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE`
- API routes: `/v1/<resource>` (plural nouns)
- Feature branches: `feature/<feature-name>`

### PR Rules
- Every PR references a task ID: `T00X: <title>`
- Every PR has passing tests
- Security-touching PRs require /reviewcode --level security output attached

### Language in Code
- Code, comments, variable names: English only
- User-facing strings: localized via i18n layer, never hardcoded
